auth.login_subtitle: Optional. You can post without an account.

about.title: What is Surbias?
about.p1: Surbias comes from a simple idea: enough of only seeing the winners.
about.p2: Social media is full of success stories. The millionaire who started in a garage, the entrepreneur who never gave up, the athlete who overcame everything. But that's the 1%. What about the other 99%?
about.p3: Here you can share your failure story. No happy ending. No perseverance tale. Just share and feel less alone. Because failing is NORMAL. Success is the exception.
about.p4: This is called survivorship bias: we only see the survivors, those who made it through the filter. And that distorts our view of reality.
about.p5: Surbias is your space to be real.
